esp32_sd_mmc_begin.tooltip: Initialize the SD card (SDIO, OJoy pins fixed: CLK2/CMD1/D0-40/D1-39/D2-42/D3-41); 1-bit mode has better compatibility

esp32_sd_mmc_write_file.tooltip: Write a file to the SD card (overwrite)

esp32_sd_mmc_append_file.tooltip: Append content to a file on the SD card

esp32_sd_mmc_read_file.tooltip: Read a file from the SD card

esp32_sd_mmc_delete_file.tooltip: Delete a file on the SD card

esp32_sd_mmc_exists.tooltip: Check whether a file exists on the SD card

esp32_sd_mmc_mkdir.tooltip: Create a directory on the SD card

esp32_sd_mmc_rmdir.tooltip: Remove a directory on the SD card
